nasb.text: The gate and its porches had windows all around like those other windows; the length was fifty cubits and the width twenty-five cubits.

esv.text: Both it and its vestibule had windows all around, like the windows of the others. Its length was fifty cubits, and its breadth twenty-five cubits.

cnv.text: 門的裡面和門廊周圍都有窗子，與先前的窗子一樣。南門全長二十五公尺，寬十二公尺半。

ccb.text: 通道与门廊四周的窗户也和其他的门一样，通道长二十五米，宽十二点五米。
